Checkout
Privacy

Privacy Policy

Data we collect
When you purchase a font, we receive your email address and payment confirmation from PayPal. We do not store your credit card details — all payment processing is handled by PayPal.
How we use it
Your email is used solely to send download links and license receipts. We do not send marketing emails unless you opt in.
Cookies
This site uses no tracking cookies. We use only a session cookie required for checkout functionality.
Third parties
We use PayPal for payment processing. Their privacy policy governs how PayPal handles your payment data.
Contact
For privacy enquiries email privacy@hypefortype.com
